label: Emaciated
description: All bony structures extremely prominent, no fat or muscle cover, severe emaciation
action: Emergency - immediate vet + emergency nutrition intervention required

label: Thin
description: Ribs, spine and hip bones clearly visible, minimal muscle cover, poor condition
action: Urgent - feed intervention required immediately, vet review recommended

label: Ideal
description: Ribs palpable but not visible, good muscle cover, slight fat cover, optimal condition
action: Maintain - current feeding and management is appropriate

label: Fat
description: Ribs difficult to palpate, fat deposits visible around tail head and ribs, rounded appearance
action: Reduce - decrease feed energy, monitor closely to prevent obesity

label: Obese
description: Obese, bony structures not palpable under heavy fat deposits, severe overcondition
action: Emergency diet - immediate feed reduction and vet consultation required
